Human-in-the-loop

Auto-Control Overrides

rule-based · not ML

Every automated rule below shows its current recommendation before it's allowed to act. Disable a rule to keep it reporting readings without writing device state — automation always recommends, a human always confirms.

Master Control

System Power

Turns every device off and pauses automation across the whole office. Also controllable with !on / !off on Discord and /on / /off on Telegram.
Admin

General Thresholds

PATCH /api/v1/settings
Not set — use "Use My Location" on the Overview tab
